title: Chapter 41
content:
Chapter 41: Chapter 41: Crimson Moon City

’Mmm? Their desire is gone. Is it because the already fulfilled? System, what happened here?’

[Host, desire is the current or long-time dream of the owner, but System with Incubus Celestial Eyes can only detect desire that is connected to lust. Since their desire is already fulfilled, it will vanish until they’re with something again.]

’I see... I got it. For now, let’s get some rest.’

They got up for the tub and dried themselves up want to bed.

****

Morning light shines through the gap in the room window that is covered by a curtain.

Damon woke up to the heaviness he felt in his chest. He found Mio sleeping on the top of his body.

A sigh escaped Damon’s mouth, he moved his left hand to Mio’s hair, gently caress them. He can’t move his right arm as Mia hugged them tightly.

"Wake up, girls, it’s already morning."

They slowly opened their eyes and woke up. After that the immediately got dressed and got out of the inn. Once they got out, the carriage was already waiting outside the inn.

"Good morning, young master, young ladies." The driver greeted them.

They simply nodded and entered the carriage.

****

Inside the carriage, now sit on one side and leave the other side empty. Mio and Mia stick close to Damon, hugging each of his hands.

"You two should start cultivating my yang qi if you don’t want to be pregnant."

"Well, I don’t mind having your baby," Mio said with a voice full of love and confidence.

"I also don’t mind, but it’s not the right time. We’re still you, and we’re still at the early stage of cultivation. We should focus on getting stronger in this world with the strong rules. I just want to get stronger now, so in the future when my children are in trouble, at least I can protect them." Damon explained to Mio.

"Damon is right, sister, for now we need to get stronger first," Mia added.

"B-but I heard the higher cultivation is harder for women to get pregnant. Even mom had us only when she was over 100 years old." Mio argues back.

"Mio, we’re cultivators. The higher our cultivation is, the longer we live. You will look the same as now, even if you are 100 years old with high cultivation. As long as we live, you can have a child when the times right, and believe me, no matter how high your cultivation, I have a way to make you pregnant." he told Mio with a serious expression.

Hearing that and already seeing the miracle that Damon gave them, she simply nodded.

Then Mia pulls Mio and looks her in the eyes. Then, suddenly, she nodded and began to cultivate. Seeing her sister, Mia began cultivating. Mio followed her.

Now the girls start to cultivate Damon, simply closing their eyes. He remembers what Mio said.

’The twins’ mother, huh... She must be beautiful, like her daughters...’

A sly and perverted smile appeared on Damon’s lips.

****

The journey went uneventfully. But there was something they didn’t know. High above in the sky a beautiful, mature woman with pale skin and huge breasts who float in the sky.

She wore a black dress that clung to and showed off her ample cleavage, the pale skin, and the seductive curve of her body, down to a slim waist and culminating in wide hips.

She has been following them since they left the sect.

"Hoh~ Interesting, you manage to advance from the Eighth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm to the Second Level of the True Spirit Realm in one go. You also manage to capture their heart, huh..."

"Looks like my interest in you didn’t go in vain..."

Then her body slowly vanished like a transparent curtain slowly covering her body.

"When they got back to the sect, it’s getting even more interesting. Ho~ Ho~" A seductive laugh escaped her lips as she completely vanished, leaving an echo of the laugh.

****

They finally arrive at Crimson Moon City.

Crimson Moon City sprawled before them, red-tiled roofs baking under a hazy sun, streets thick with merchants hawking fire crystals.

Damon’s eyes snapped open as the carriage jolted to a stop.

Mio and Mia slowly open their eyes. Damon grabs their waist, stepping out. He tossed the driver a gold coin.

The driver bowed. "Thank you for using my service, young master, young ladies."

They journeyed past the town gates in the direction of Fire Valley, scorching air ascending as the heavy exhales of parched soil.

Right outside the Fire Valley, before entering the trees that filled the horizon, dozens of people camped outside.

Most had injuries on their body, some even with lost limbs. There were disciples from random sects, and the rest were mercenaries.

Everybody there had one goal, which was to hunt Flame Monsters for their monster core, valuable and spiritual resources that cultivators use to cultivate themselves.

Monster cores are what beasts use to cultivate and store their cultivation base. If a beast with a solid cultivation base died, they would have a chance of leaving behind a monster core with their remaining cultivation base inside that cultivators could use to cultivate themselves.

Monster cores could also be used to create powerful weapons that greatly boost the strength of their wielders, hence their high demand and value.

Damon and the girls casually walked hand-in-hand towards the entrance of the Fire Valley with the heat constantly burning in the background.

When they reached the camps, the people there stared at them with envious and awe-struck gazes.

"Look, it’s the core disciple of Azure Dragon Sect."

"Woah the look so beautiful."

"Wait, who is that guy with a handsome face that they clung to?"

"Fuck, I wish I were him...."

"Is he trying to impress them? Hahaha, he has a death wish."

A few individuals there stared at Damon, who was walking with two beautiful girls into a dangerous place.

They have seen many overconfident individuals enter Fire Valley just to impress others, only to return with grave injuries after being here for many days.

Ignoring the murmur, Damon began to ask.

"So, how do we do this?"
